outbound.choose:
<when condition="@(context.Response.StatusCode >= 200 && context.Response.StatusCode < 300)">

      
      <set-variable name="response_body"
                    value="@(context.Response.Body.As(preserveContent: true))" />

      

      

      

      
      <set-variable name="model_deployment"
                    value="@{
                      var body = (JObject)context.Variables["response_body"];
                      var modelFromBody = (string)body?["model"];
                      if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(modelFromBody)) return modelFromBody;
                      // Fallback: parse from request URL path /openai/deployments/{name}/...
                      var path = context.Request.Url.Path;
                      var segments = path.Split('/');
                      var idx = Array.IndexOf(segments, "deployments");
                      return (idx >= 0 && idx + 1 < segments.Length) ? segments[idx + 1] : "unknown";
                    }" />

      
      <set-variable name="estimated_cost_usd"
                    value="@{
                      var model = (string)context.Variables["model_deployment"];
                      var prompt = (int)context.Variables["prompt_tokens"];
                      var completion = (int)context.Variables["completion_tokens"];

                      decimal cost = 0m;
                      if (model.Contains("gpt-4o")) {
                        var promptPrice = decimal.Parse(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("price-gpt-4o-prompt-per-1k") ?? "0.0025");
                        var completionPrice = decimal.Parse(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("price-gpt-4o-completion-per-1k") ?? "0.01");
                        cost = (prompt / 1000m) * promptPrice + (completion / 1000m) * completionPrice;
                      } else if (model.Contains("ada-002") || model.Contains("embedding")) {
                        var embedPrice = decimal.Parse(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("price-ada-002-per-1k") ?? "0.0001");
                        cost = (prompt / 1000m) * embedPrice;
                      }
                      return Math.Round(cost, 6);
                    }" />

      
      
        @{
          return new JObject(
            new JProperty("timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
            new JProperty("event_type", "ai_request_cost"),
            new JProperty("tenant_id", (string)context.Variables["tenant_id"]),
            new JProperty("tenant_tier", (string)context.Variables["tenant_tier"]),
            new JProperty("correlation_id", (string)context.Variables["correlation_id"]),
            new JProperty("model_deployment", (string)context.Variables["model_deployment"]),
            new JProperty("region", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-ms-region", "unknown")),
            new JProperty("prompt_tokens", (int)context.Variables["prompt_tokens"]),
            new JProperty("completion_tokens", (int)context.Variables["completion_tokens"]),
            new JProperty("total_tokens", (int)context.Variables["total_tokens"]),
            new JProperty("estimated_cost_usd", (decimal)context.Variables["estimated_cost_usd"]),
            new JProperty("status_code", context.Response.StatusCode),
            new JProperty("duration_ms", (long)context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds)
          ).ToString();
        }
      

      
      
        @(((int)context.Variables["prompt_tokens"]).ToString())
      
      
        @(((int)context.Variables["completion_tokens"]).ToString())
      
      
        @(((decimal)context.Variables["estimated_cost_usd"]).ToString("F6"))
      

    

    
    
      
        @{
          return new JObject(
            new JProperty("timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
            new JProperty("event_type", "ai_request_error"),
            new JProperty("tenant_id", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("tenant_id", "unknown")),
            new JProperty("tenant_tier", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("tenant_tier", "unknown")),
            new JProperty("correlation_id", (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("correlation_id", context.RequestId.ToString())),
            new JProperty("status_code", context.Response.StatusCode),
            new JProperty("duration_ms", (long)context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds)
          ).ToString();
        }
